expectations.evidence: Workflow Reference: 'This approach follows the Sync BMAD Documents workflow (workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md), specifically: Step 5, Step 6, Step 7, Step 8, Step 9'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs diff to identify the conflicting section
Shows the conflict indicator for the Overview section
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Lightning bolt -- both changed (conflict)' and 'the Overview section should show the lightning bolt conflict indicator'

expectations.text: Presents both the local version and the remote version side by side
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'Present both versions to the user: Local version (your changes): [contents...] Remote version (Jira changes): [contents...]'

expectations.text: Asks the user to choose: keep local, keep remote, or skip
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'offer three options per conflicting section: 1. Keep local, 2. Keep remote, 3. Skip'

expectations.text: Executes push or pull based on the user's choice for the conflicted section
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'If user chooses Keep local: node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs push <epic-doc-path>' and 'If user chooses Keep remote: node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs pull <epic-doc-path>'
